result.stdout:
USAGE:
  RpcNetGen [-n <namespace>] [-o <output file>] [-p] [-u] <input x file path>

  -n <namespace>     Namespace in the generated file.

  -o <output file>   Output file.

  -p                 Public classes (default is internal).
